subject: Re: Incident Report #9958
content:
Frank — 

Got it, makes sense. I'll loop in Frank from Engineering to get their
perspective on the Payment Gateway changes. In the meantime, I've
created a shared doc where we can track the open items:

https://docs.google.com/d/07e1cd7dca89a167

Current open items (8 total):
- Catalyst integration testing (owner: Frank)
- StreamLine Solutions contract review (owner: Paul)
- Agile Retrospectives documentation (owner: Frank)

Please add any additional concerns there. I'll consolidate everything
before our Thursday sync.

Thanks,
Paul

subject: Re: Incident Report #9958
content:
Hi Paul,

I had a call with NetSecure Pro today about the Legacy CRM integration.
Key takeaways:

- They can deliver the beta phase by 9/4, which is 6 weeks ahead of our
schedule
- Pricing: $205K for the base package + $59K for AWS Cost Optimization
add-on
- They require a 1-year commitment minimum
- Technical contact will be Uma Lee (VP of Product)

For comparison, DataFlow Systems quoted $149K with a more flexible
contract.

Should we bring this to the All-Hands for a final decision?

Best,
Nate

Nate Lewis | Data Scientist
